nodes.body: { 🎮 Game Releases } _James Kane_ is launching into early access with [STARSPEED: Zero-G Aerial Combat](https://bsky.app/profile/jamesckane.bsky.social/post/3mfkkdrj44s2l), which features multiplayer and a campaign inspired by Descent and DOOM with a gripping story & synthwave OST, in partnership with WorldLabs.ai!

{ 🎮 Game Demos } _Colorgrave_ has been burning the midnight oil to get a demo out for [Curse Chapter: Dawnthief](https://store.steampowered.com/app/4228390/Curse_Chapter_Dawnthief/) in Steam Next Fest!
{ 🎮 Game Demos } _Studio Tapioca_ has a new demo out for [Bunny Beats](https://store.steampowered.com/app/917640/Bunny_Beats/), a cute rhythm-matching game, in Steam Next Fest!
{ 🎮 Game Demos } _Jundroo_ has a demo out for their new flight sim [Simple Planes 2](https://store.steampowered.com/app/3938060/SimplePlanes_2_Demo/) in Steam Next Fest!
{ 🎮 Game Demos } _Wonderpond_ has a new demo out for [Gelli Fields](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1965980/Gelli_Fields/), the cozy gelli farming roguelite, in Steam Next Fest!
{ 🎮 Game Demos } _Butterscotch Shenanigans'_ wacky roguelite dude-builder [How Many Dudes?](https://store.steampowered.com/app/3934270/How_Many_Dudes/) has a demo out in Steam Next Fest!

{!header} February is quietly one of the best months of the year to make games. While January is full of pressure and December is full of distraction, February hits a sweet spot that game developers uniquely benefit from. This month brought the Steam Next Fest and the Adroit Game Jam, and our developers rose to the challenge:
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Kelsey Watkins_ showed off her [cabinet prototype](https://bsky.app/profile/neitherworld.bsky.social/post/3mejzc6gbhk2z) for her Global Game Jam game!

{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Fairlii_ has been regularly posting Developer Update vlogs - the latest was on how their game, [Gelli Fields](https://gellifields.com/), performed at the [Steam Next Fest](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4HSnYNgPL68)!

{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Kris Truitt_ posted a [very important update to if you can pet the dog](https://bsky.app/profile/kristruitt.bsky.social/post/3mer63lo2dc2w) in [Mansion of a Million Monsters](https://store.steampowered.com/app/4251230/Mansion_of_a_Million_Monsters_Demo/)!

{ 🎮 Game Demos } _Studio Tapioca_'s [Bunny Beats](https://store.steampowered.com/app/917640/Bunny_Beats/), a rhythm game where bunnies swing mochi hammers to the beat, has a demo out in Steam Next Fest!

{ 🕹️ Game Jam Releases } _Evie D._ released [waveform](https://evie-d.itch.io/waveform), a unique game written entirely in C++! Using SDF rendering and some artistic shaderwork, shapes merge and melt together in a trippy and satisfying experience. This game won the [Adroit Game Jam](https://itch.io/jam/adroit-game-jam-2026)!

{ 🕹️ Game Jam Releases } _Axol Studio_ released [supurrposition](https://axolstudio.itch.io/supurrposition), following the quantastic adventures of an uncertain kitten, for the [Adroit Game Jam](https://itch.io/jam/adroit-game-jam-2026)!
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Goofy Gourd Studios_ are working on [setting up their pause menu](https://bsky.app/profile/goofygourds.bsky.social/post/3mfcjp5vvfs23).
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Tony Woljnar_ [continues to work on](https://bsky.app/profile/tonywojnar.bsky.social/post/3mfwedddb7c2m) the Toxic Tavern level for Dribble 2!
{ 🎼 Music Releases } Celebrating the release of Demon Tides, _Fat Bard_ posted the soundtrack!
{ 🎼 Music Releases } _Walpang_ is [uploading their work](https://www.instagram.com/p/DU1yIeYj8Af/) to Spotify!

{ 🕹️ Game Jam Releases } _Vadeum_ released [Quantum Superhacker](https://vadeum.itch.io/quantum-superhacker) for the Adroit Game Jam! "You invented QuantumOS. Now hack the world and make it a better place."

{ 🕹️ Game Jam Releases } _Grenhunterr_ released [Quantum Slicer](https://grenhunterrwastaken.itch.io/quantum-slicer) for the [Adroit Game Jam](https://itch.io/jam/adroit-game-jam-2026)! The goal of the game is to destroy as many objects as you can without missing. Good luck!

events.title: Game Club: 30XX
events.description:
Game Club is like a book club except we pick a game to play each month and then meet up to discuss it with a focus on game design.  This month's game is the roguelite action platformer, 30XX!
We will be meeting virtually on Discord this month (in the general voice chat). Come share your thoughts on the game with us!

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/
